title: Set up sheds for placement of poultry
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Set up sheds for placement of poultry demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to work in poultry shed

pcs.text: Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility.

pcs.text: Identify activities to be undertaken from work program and/or supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify activities to be undertaken from work program and/or supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify activities to be undertaken from work program and/or supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify age, quantity and housing requirements of poultry being transferred to shed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify age, quantity and housing requirements of poultry being transferred to shed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify age, quantity and housing requirements of poultry being transferred to shed.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks.

pcs.text: Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for preparing the shed and placing the poultry
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for preparing the shed and placing the poultry?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for preparing the shed and placing the poultry.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to work in poultry shed

elements.title: Check and maintain shed and equipment

pcs.text: Apply biosecurity procedures to minimise entry of pathogens into poultry shed via own activities and equipment being introduced in shed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply biosecurity procedures to minimise entry of pathogens into poultry shed via own activities and equipment being introduced in shed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply biosecurity procedures to minimise entry of pathogens into poultry shed via own activities and equipment being introduced in shed.

pcs.text: Check shed and work surfaces are clean and sanitised
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check shed and work surfaces are clean and sanitised?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check shed and work surfaces are clean and sanitised.

pcs.text: Check tools and equipment are operational, clean and sanitised
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check tools and equipment are operational, clean and sanitised?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check tools and equipment are operational, clean and sanitised.

pcs.text: Check pest, vermin and/or predator controls are in place, and adjust as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check pest, vermin and/or predator controls are in place, and adjust as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check pest, vermin and/or predator controls are in place, and adjust as required.

pcs.text: Check lights, time switches and other shed equipment are operational
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check lights, time switches and other shed equipment are operational?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check lights, time switches and other shed equipment are operational.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Check and maintain shed and equipment

elements.title: Prepare shed

pcs.text: Prepare poultry floor surface according to incoming poultry requirements, ensuring it is clean and dry
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare poultry floor surface according to incoming poultry requirements, ensuring it is clean and dry?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare poultry floor surface according to incoming poultry requirements, ensuring it is clean and dry.

pcs.text: Set up feeders, drinkers, temperature, ventilation and other equipment in shed according to incoming poultry requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set up feeders, drinkers, temperature, ventilation and other equipment in shed according to incoming poultry requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set up feeders, drinkers, temperature, ventilation and other equipment in shed according to incoming poultry requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure that bird barriers and/or brooder curtains are in place and operating if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure that bird barriers and/or brooder curtains are in place and operating if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure that bird barriers and/or brooder curtains are in place and operating if required.

pcs.text: Check and adjust watering, feeding, ventilation and temperature control systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and adjust watering, feeding, ventilation and temperature control systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and adjust watering, feeding, ventilation and temperature control systems.

pcs.text: Check and adjust lighting equipment and programs according to poultry age
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and adjust lighting equipment and programs according to poultry age?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and adjust lighting equipment and programs according to poultry age.

pcs.text: Test alarm systems and time switches
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test alarm systems and time switches?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test alarm systems and time switches.

pcs.text: Install additional drinkers and feeders, or lay paper and spread feed on it as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install additional drinkers and feeders, or lay paper and spread feed on it as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install additional drinkers and feeders, or lay paper and spread feed on it as required.

pcs.text: Complete records and report issues as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records and report issues as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records and report issues as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare shed

elements.title: Place poultry

pcs.text: Ensure shed temperature, ventilation and floor surfaces meet the requirements of incoming poultry
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure shed temperature, ventilation and floor surfaces meet the requirements of incoming poultry?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure shed temperature, ventilation and floor surfaces meet the requirements of incoming poultry.

pcs.text: Check incoming poultry health indicators according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check incoming poultry health indicators according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check incoming poultry health indicators according to enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Transfer poultry safely from existing containers/crates into appropriate housing, using safe manual handling and low stress bird handling techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transfer poultry safely from existing containers/crates into appropriate housing, using safe manual handling and low stress bird handling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transfer poultry safely from existing containers/crates into appropriate housing, using safe manual handling and low stress bird handling techniques.

pcs.text: Check poultry behaviour and health regularly after placement according to enterprise animal welfare procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check poultry behaviour and health regularly after placement according to enterprise animal welfare procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check poultry behaviour and health regularly after placement according to enterprise animal welfare procedures.

pcs.text: Check feed, water and shed conditions after placement meet poultry needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check feed, water and shed conditions after placement meet poultry needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check feed, water and shed conditions after placement meet poultry needs.

pcs.text: Clean and sanitise crates and/or equipment as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and sanitise crates and/or equipment as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and sanitise crates and/or equipment as required.

pcs.text: Dispose of waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Complete records and report issues as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records and report issues as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records and report issues as required.
